svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Multi-tenant SaaS Architecture" id="multi-tenant-saas"> <mxGraphModel dx="-704" dy="-277" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="aws-cloud" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_aws_cloud;strokeColor=#AAB7B8;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=0;" value="AWS Cloud" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="740" width="1240" x="80" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="region" parent="aws-cloud" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_region;strokeColor=#00A4A6;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#147EBA;dashed=1;" value="Region" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="660" width="1160" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cognito" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#DD344C;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.cognito;" value="Amazon Cognito
User Pool" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="80" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api-gateway" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.api_gateway;" value="Amazon API Gateway
(Regional)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="280" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lambda-api" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#ED7100;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.lambda_function;" value="Lambda Function
(Tenant API)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="480" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lambda-onboarding" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#ED7100;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.lambda_function;" value="Lambda Function
(Onboarding)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="480" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dynamodb-metadata" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#C925D1;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.dynamodb;" value="DynamoDB
(Tenant Metadata)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="720" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dynamodb-data" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#C925D1;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.dynamodb;" value="DynamoDB
(Tenant Data)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="720" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3-bucket" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#7AA116;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.s3_bucket;" value="Amazon S3
(Tenant Data)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="62" width="60" x="720" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cloudwatch" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#F34482;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch;" value="Amazon CloudWatch
(Logs & Metrics)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="920" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-cognito-api" edge="1" parent="region" source="cognito" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="api-gateway" value="JWT Token"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-api-lambda-api" edge="1" parent="region" source="api-gateway" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="lambda-api" value="Invoke"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-api-lambda-onboarding" edge="1" parent="region" source="api-gateway" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="lambda-onboarding" value="Invoke"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-api-dynamodb-data" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="dynamodb-data" value="Query/Put
(tenant_id)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-api-s3" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="s3-bucket" value="Get/Put
(prefix isolation)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-onboarding-dynamodb-metadata" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-onboarding" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="dynamodb-metadata" value="PutItem"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-onboarding-cognito" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-onboarding" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="cognito" value="Create User"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-api-cloudwatch" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="cloudwatch" value="Logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-onboarding-cloudwatch" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-onboarding" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="cloudwatch" value="Logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-api-cloudwatch" edge="1" parent="region" source="api-gateway" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="cloudwatch" value="Logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="isolation-note" parent="region" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF4E6;strokeColor=#D79B00;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Tenant Isolation:
- Cognito custom:tenant_id attribute
- DynamoDB partition key (tenant_id)
- S3 prefix-based isolation
- IAM policy enforcement" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="260" x="80" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pattern-note" parent="region" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E6F2FF;strokeColor=#0066CC;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Architecture Pattern:
- Pool model (shared resources)
- Serverless (cost-optimized)
- ARM64 Lambda (20% cost savings)
- Pay-per-request DynamoDB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="260" x="400" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tenant-users" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#232F3D;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.users;" value="Tenant Users" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="40" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-users-cognito" edge="1" parent="1" source="tenant-users" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="cognito" value="Authenticate"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-users-api" edge="1" parent="1" source="tenant-users" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="api-gateway" value="HTTPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Tenant Isolation:
- Cognito custom:tenant_id attribute
- DynamoDB partition key (tenant_id)
- S3 prefix-based isolation
- IAM policy enforcement

div.div:
Architecture Pattern:
- Pool model (shared resources)
- Serverless (cost-optimized)
- ARM64 Lambda (20% cost savings)
- Pay-per-request DynamoDB
